nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Ranongga white-eye
nodes.summary: Ranongga white-eye（Zosterops splendidus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Ranongga white-eye。

nodes.name: Ranongga white-eye
nodes.summary: The Ranongga white-eye or splendid white-eye (Zosterops splendidus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet
